titlestmt.titleproper: Yale Center for British Art Communications and Marketing Department records
Yale Center for British Art Communications and Marketing Department records

publicationstmt.publisher: Yale Center for British Art, Archives

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Yale Center for British Art, Archives

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Monday April 6, 2026 at 18:00

did.unittitle: Yale Center for British Art Communications and Marketing Department records

corpname.part: Yale Center for British Art, Archives
Yale Center for British Art. Communications and Marketing Department

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This collection consists of administrative files, promotional materials, press releases, and records of Yale Center for British Art exhibitions. This collection also contains media, mostly videos and photographs, created by the Communications Department from 1995 to the present.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The Communications and Marketing department oversees media relations, marketing, communications, advertising, and visitor services at the Yale Center for British Art. It promotes special exhibitions and programs, conducts market research and analysis, and manages all of the museum's e-communications and social media programs. The department also works to increase awareness about the Center with colleagues at the university, in the arts community, and abroad.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Portions of this collection are unprocessed and may not be available for immediate access.

did.unittitle: Series I. Public Communications

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Material in Series 1 is arranged into seven sub-series: Administrative Materials [RESTRICTED] , Press Releases , Press Kits , Press Coverage , Advertisements , Promotional Materials , and Slides and Images .
Each subseries is arranged chronologically, except for the following:
Sub-series 1: Administrative Materials - Materials are grouped by document type and arranged chronologically within each category.

Sub-series 2: Press Releases - Materials derive from separate accessions and maintain their original order. Some documents are grouped by category and arranged chronologically within that category. Documents received separately are individually described and arranged chronologically.
Sub-series 7: Slides and Images - Materials are arranged in their original, rough chronological order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series comprises administrative and public-facing materials produced between 1964 and 2025 to promote and chronicle events, exhibitions, and programs at the Yale Center for British Art. Materials include press releases, press kits, newspaper clippings, external publications containing Museum advertisements, promotional materials, and photographic prints, slides, and negatives. These materials demonstrate the Yale Center for British Art's printed media footprint, the scope of Museum publicity and marketing efforts, and the institution's evolving voice over five decades.

Documents span multiple departmental reorganizations and thus include records from the departments of Public Information (1977-1979), Publications and Information (1979-circa 1995), Public Relations and Marketing (circa 1995-2006), Communications and Marketing, and Development.

did.unittitle: Sub-series 1: Administrative Materials [RESTRICTED]

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This subseries is restricted. Please contact the Yale Center for British Art Archives for more information.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Materials in this sub-series are grouped by document type and arranged chronologically within that category.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This sub-series contains administrative records including project files and department calendars that fall under access restrictions.

did.unittitle: Sub-series 2: Press Releases

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Materials in this sub-series derive from separate accessions and maintain their original order. Some are grouped by category and date range into folders containing multiple press releases. These are: Yale University News Releases 1977-1978, Programs 2002-2008, Calendars 2003-2008, Exhibitions 2003-2008, and Research 2003-2008. Remaining press releases are individually described and arranged chronologically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This sub-series contains formal announcements by Yale University and the Yale Center for British Art to publicize the Museum's activities from 1966-2008. Press releases provide a detailed chronicle of the Yale Center for British Art's staff appointments, programs, events, and exhibitions from its inception as the Paul Mellon Center for British Art and British Studies through its 2008 curatorial season.

Sub-series 3: Press Kits

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Contains restricted fragile material. All material has been digitized. Researchers must consult the digital surrogates instead of the originals. For further information consult the Yale Center for British Art Archives.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Materials in this sub-series are arranged chronologically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This sub-series contains press kits compiled between 2001-2024 for distribution to staff and external media to publicize Yale Center for British Art programs and exhibitions. Kits may contain press releases, promotional materials such as brochures and buttons, photocopies of articles relevant to exhibition themes, born-digital materials (DVD-Rs), and realia.

Sub-series 4: Press Coverage

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Materials in this sub-series are arranged chronologically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This sub-series contains printed media coverage of Yale Center for British Art events, programs, and exhibitions published between 1964-1978, 1997-2012, 2017-19, and 2023. The bulk of materials are newspaper and magazine clippings and online printouts arranged by topic or date range. Full newspaper and magazine issues are listed by publication title. Topics include Paul Mellon's founding endowment to Yale and the Yale Center for British Art's construction and opening, the 2007 Paul Mellon Centennial, numerous exhibitions, appointments, and acquisitions, and early-2000s outreach and education programs undertaken to expand the Museum's reach within Yale and New Haven.

did.unittitle: Miscellaneous Publications on Paul Mellon's Gift to Yale

Miscellaneous (1 of 3)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Clippings originally compiled chronologically in a single binder and have been divided into three folders. Folder 1 of 3 includes materials dated from March to October 1998. Topics include travelling and contemporary exhibitions; YCBA programs, events, and collaborations; feature articles on New Haven arts and tourism; and other mentions of the YCBA.

did.unittitle: Miscellaneous (2 of 3)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Clippings originally compiled chronologically in a single binder and have been divided into three folders. Folder 2 of 3 includes materials dated from November 1998-September 1999. Topics include travelling and contemporary exhibitions; YCBA programs, events, and collaborations; feature articles on New Haven arts and tourism; and other mentions of the YCBA.

did.unittitle: Miscellaneous (3 of 3)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Clippings originally compiled chronologically in a single binder and have been divided into three folders. Folder 3 of 3 includes materials dated from October 1999-March 2000. Topics include travelling and contemporary exhibitions; YCBA programs, events, and collaborations; feature articles on New Haven arts and tourism; and other mentions of the YCBA.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Materials in this folder include press coverage of the scientific research leading up to the exhibition's London opening at the National Portrait Gallery, March 2-May 29, 2006, as well as press coverage and promotional materials for the London exhibition. Dates range from September 2004-March 2006.

did.unittitle: Searching for Shakespeare, June 23-September 17, 2006 (2 of 2)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Materials in this folder include press coverage of the American iteration of Searching for Shakespeare at the Yale Center for British Art. Dates range from March 2006-February 2007.

Sub-series 5: Advertisements

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Materials in this sub-series are arranged chronologically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This sub-series contains printed advertisements for Yale Center for British Art exhibitions and events published between 1999-2002 and 2012-2018. Materials from 1999-2002 are primarily newspaper and magazine clippings; materials from 2012-2018 are full publications (magazines, newspapers, theater and event programs, other ephemera) containing Yale Center for British Art advertisements in situ.

Sub-series 6: Promotional Materials

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Materials in this sub-series are arranged chronologically.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This sub-series contains promotional materials for public distribution, including newsletters, pamphlets, brochures, information booklets, calendars, postcards, posters, and realia.

did.unittitle: Events and Exhibitions

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Materials include: annotated catalog to the Royal Academy of Arts in London's Winter Exhibition 1964-1965, "Painting in England, 1700-1850"; invitations to opening receptions for "Rowlandson Drawings from the Paul Mellon Collection" (November 15, 1977) and "Walter Sickert as Printmaker" (February 20, 1979); flyer for "Thomas Bewick: artist and naturalist" (1978-1979); miscellaneous postcards.

did.unittitle: Paul Mellon Centre Newsletter
Events and Exhibitions: Programs
Paul Mellon Centre Newsletter
Year in Review 2005, Marketing Initiatives 2006
Events and Exhibitions: Paul Mellon Centennial

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Materials include: programs - "Paul Mellon Centennial Year Press Luncheon" (February 26, 2007), "Paul Mellon Centennial Year Press Briefing and Breakfast (April 13, 2007); invitations, media preview (April 16, 2007) and exhibition opening (April 17, 2007) for "Paul Mellon's Legacy: A Passion for British Art"; pamphlets - "Paul Mellon's Legacy" (YCBA, 2007), "An American's Passion for British Art" (Royal Academy of Arts, 2007-2008); betacam - "Paul Mellon Centennial: National Gallery of Art's Paul Mellon: In His Own Words, Press Clips" (2007)

Sub-series 7: Slides and Images

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Materials in this sub-series are arranged in their original, rough chronological order.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This sub-series contains photographic prints, negatives, and slides depicting the Yale Center for British Art. Most images are black and white and document the building's architecture, installations, and objects from 1998-2001. Other images depict YCBA events and pre-1989 exhibitions. Richard Caspole was the primary photographer of images captured between 1998 and 2001.

did.unittitle: Building Exterior Photographs

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Black and white photographic prints. Photography by Richard Caspole.

did.unittitle: Building Interior Photographs

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Film negatives, contact sheets, 35 mm slides. Photography by Richard Caspole.

did.unittitle: Installation Photos

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Black and white photographic prints. Photography by Richard Caspole.

did.unittitle: Programs and Concerts

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Black and white photographic prints by Richard Caspole. Three color photographs of "Picture This" event, photographer unknown.

did.unittitle: Paul Mellon

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Black and white photographic prints.

did.unittitle: Permanent Collection

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Negatives, black and white photographic prints, 35 mm slides.

did.unittitle: Old Exhibition Images

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Black and white photographic prints, 35 mm slides.
